titleStmt.title: SII 31.65: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 65. (A.R. No. B 214 of 1938.) CHIḌIPIRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the dīpastaṁbha outside the temple of Agastyēśvara.
It is dated Śaka 1430, [Vi]bhava, Mārgaśira śu. 15, corresponding 1508 A.D., December 7, Thursday, Lunar eclipse.

Records the various specific taxes levied on yanumu (female buffalo), yanupōlū (male baffalo), oxen, cows horse (guṟṟāmu) marriage parties of bride and bridegroom (penḍlikim āmḍa bida, pemḍli magabiḍde vāru) by Sāḷuva Gōvindarāju, son of Rāchirāju of Kauṇḍinya gōtra, Yajuśākha for the maintenance of worship in the temple of Agastyēśvara situated at Chiḍipirēla. The inscription is engraved by Gōvindayya. The donor Sāḷuva Gōvindarāju, son of Rāchirāju probably got Chandupurēla as nāyankara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī .
jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava
¨rṣaṁbulu 1430 Agunēṭi vi
bhavasaṁvatsara mā¨rgaśira śu 15 lu
śrīmatu caḍupurēla Āgantēśvaraliṁgaṁ divya
śrī pādapadmaṁbulaku kavuṁḍinya gō
tra yajuśākhadhyāyulaina rācirājuṁ
gāri komāruṁḍu gōviṁdarājuṁgā
ru sāṣṭāṁgadaṁḍaṁ veṭṭi I
cina dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ . māku vīranarasiṁgarā
yalu pāliṁcina nāyaṁ
ṭi kōla gā

Ācaṁdrā¨rkasdāIgā naḍapumani A
gastīśvara dēvuniki kavuṁḍinyagōtra ya
juśśākhāthyāyulaina rācirājuṁgā
ri kumāruṁḍu sāḷunagōviṁdayya Aṣṭa
bhōga tējasvāmyaṁgānu te
Ani Iccina dāna śāsanaṁ . I
yavvaru ganaka tappinānu vāraṇāsilō gō
brāhmaṇa vadha sēsina pāpāna bōvu vā
ru svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōharēti
vasuṁdhara saṣṭhi¨rvaruṣa sahasrāṇi vriṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ . suṁkhaṁ
yanu muku Þ0 . yanupōtulaṁ yaddu
80 . Āvuku 80 . guṟṟānkuprage 20 ki
gaṁ . kolvuku ga 1 ruta = peṁḍliki Ā
ṁḍi biḍaku peṁḍliki 1 magabiḍṭevāru
Ā vubhayaṁr taga . yīmariyādanu
sāgiṁciri gāna yīva¨rttanaku yava
ru tappinānu mānābhimānālu
vāru . gōviṁdarāju
vrālu . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
